markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on renewal, SEO strategy, and new product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal:** The $10k renewal package is rejected. Backlinks are critical for SEO success (60% of lift for the "AI Roleplay Software" page), making the $12k package the only viable option.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [**New Product Launch:** "Call Scoring," a new product priced at \~$1/scored call, launches by Jan 31. SEO will build topical authority via a content cluster to support the launch.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [**Content Priorities:** Immediate focus is a "Sales Roleplay Scripts/Scenarios" piece to capture high-intent traffic. The next priority is the "Call Scoring" content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [**Performance:** December traffic matched November despite seasonality, and January is showing strong recovery, indicating the site is performing well after the Google Core update.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### Renewal Decision

  - [**Context:** The renewal decision is pending Sean's availability. Garett confirmed GrowthX is the preferred vendor, with no immediate threat from competitors or in-house options.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [**Package Options:**](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
      - [**$12k flat renewal:** Includes backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
      - [**$10k flat renewal:** Excludes backlinks.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [**Decision:** The $10k package is rejected.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Backlinks are a primary driver of SEO success.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
      - [**Evidence:** For the "AI Roleplay Software" page, backlinks provided \~60% of the ranking lift, while on-page SEO provided the remaining \~40%.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)

### New Product SEO Strategy: Call Scoring

  - [**Product Details:**](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
      - [**Launch:** By Jan 31.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Pricing:** \~$1 per scored call.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
      - [**Go-to-Market:** Email, organic social, and paid campaigns (LinkedIn/Meta).](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [**SEO Strategy:** Build topical authority for the "Call Scoring" cluster to support the launch.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current SERP for "Exec vs. Gong" shows low authority, indicating a major opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=956.0)
      - [**Execution:** Create a content cluster (blog posts, commercial pages) to capture demand and establish Exec as a key player.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [**Landing Page Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Page launches by Jan 31.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Action:** Garett will provide the Figma copy by Jan 23 for Jo to optimize with SEO keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

### Content Strategy: Sales Roleplay Funnel

  - [**Problem:** The current "AI Roleplay Software" page cannot effectively rank for the separate intent of "sales roleplay software."](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new "Sales Roleplay Software" landing page is needed, with a target launch of mid-February.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [**Content Priority:** Create a "Sales Roleplay Scripts/Scenarios" piece.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Capture high-intent traffic suggested by Google Autocomplete.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [**Execution:** Refresh existing roleplay content with a business angle to attract the correct audience and avoid ranking for casual, non-business intent.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)

### Technical & Performance Updates

  - [**Redirects:** Two blog posts published on `exec.com` instead of the correct domain require 301 redirects.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
      - [**Action:** Garett to implement redirects to the "Best Sales Roleplay" blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [**Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**December:** Traffic matched November, successfully navigating holiday seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**January:** Traffic is recovering strongly and is on track to surpass December's results.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
      - [**Google Core Update (Dec 29):** No negative impact was observed.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Garett:**](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
      - [Present the $12k renewal package to Sean.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
      - [Provide "Call Scoring" Figma copy by Jan 23 for SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Implement 301 redirects for the two specified blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [Optimize "Call Scoring" landing page copy by Jan 23.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
      - [Create a "Sales Roleplay Scripts/Scenarios" content piece (high priority).](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
      - [Begin the "Call Scoring" content cluster (next priority).](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1842.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call to define Q1/Q2 business goals and align the SEO roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/DmCtvaHyBXyJLLi1vJWYZCBrGvFA3W4D?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
